# Pin High

> Pin High (pinhigh.co.za) ranks every GolfRSA-affiliated golf course (400+) in
> South Africa using ratings from everyday golfers — not expert panels.
> Golfers rate courses they have played on six criteria — value, conditions,
> greens, layout, halfway house and staff — with an overall score computed as
> the average. Rankings update live as ratings come in, ordered by average
> golfer rating with rating counts shown.

## Rankings

- [National rankings](https://pinhigh.co.za/): all South African courses ranked by golfer ratings
- [Western Cape](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/western-cape)
- [Eastern Cape](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/eastern-cape)
- [KwaZulu-Natal](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/kwazulu-natal)
- [Gauteng](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/gauteng)
- [Mpumalanga](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/mpumalanga)
- [Limpopo](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/limpopo)
- [North West](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/north-west)
- [Free State](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/free-state)
- [Northern Cape](https://pinhigh.co.za/province/northern-cape)

## 19th hole rankings

South Africa's clubhouse bars and halfway houses, ranked separately by golfers
on atmosphere, drinks, food, view and service:
https://pinhigh.co.za/19th-holes

## Course pages

Each course has a page at https://pinhigh.co.za/course/{slug} with location,
designer, golfer ratings per category (course and 19th hole), reviews and
photos. The full list of courses is in the sitemap:
https://pinhigh.co.za/sitemap.xml

## More

- [About and ranking methodology](https://pinhigh.co.za/about)
- [Blog](https://pinhigh.co.za/blog)
